texto: To my mind, the chief conclusion to be drawn from Derrida’s analysis is that the human-animal distinction is, strictly speaking, nonsensical. How could a simple (or even a highly refined) binary distinction approach doing justice to the complex ethical and ontological matters at stake here?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Matthew Calarco que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “To my mind, the chief conclusion to be drawn from Derrida’s analysis is that the human-animal dis…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, animals, distinction, com foco em reflexao.
